about.title: Chapel Hill's trusted medspa
about.body: MedSpa 501 was founded on the belief that aging well is a choice — and that true confidence starts from within. Our multi-provider team blends the art of aesthetics with the science of wellness, delivering personalized care tailored to your unique goals. Founded by Franklin Roye, Allie Vivirito, Greg Vassie, Josh Dobstaff MD, and Han Su, MedSpa 501 brings together healthcare leadership, pharmacy expertise, and clinical excellence under one roof.
bullets: Best Spa + Best New Business — Chapel Hill Magazine 2025
Partnered with 501 Pharmacy for custom IV and skincare formulations
Multi-provider team with deep aesthetic and wellness expertise

finalCta.title: Ready to feel your best?
finalCta.body: Book a consultation and let our team build a personalized plan around your goals.
